name: Mega Copper Ltd.
summary: Mega Copper Ltd., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral properties primarily in British Columbia, Canada. The company has an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Quesnel Lake East project located in the Cariboo Mining District, British Columbia. Mega Copper Ltd. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
